FareRules.FareRuleDetail:
The FareBasisCode is: UHBO
These are just hand bag fares there is no checked in baggage for this fare. Changes and cancellations are permitted as per applicable rules and charges.

If passenger is carrying Check-in Baggage at the last minute then below charges will apply:
S.NoCheck-In Baggage Weight SlabPrice( in INR)
1.Upto 15 KgFlat Fee of INR 400/-
2.Above 15 KgINR 400/- (for the first 15 kg.)
INR 300/- per kg. for each additional kg.


  • GST, RAF AND ANY OTHER APPLICABLE CHARGES ARE EXTRA.
  • FEES ARE INDICATIVE PER PAX AND PER SECTOR.
  • FOR DOMESTIC BOOKINGS, PASSENGERS MUST SUBMIT THE CANCELLATION OR REISSUE REQUEST AT LEAST 2 HOURS BEFORE THE TIME LIMIT DEFINED IN THE AIRLINE's POLICY.
  • FOR INTERNATIONAL BOOKINGS, PASSENGERS MUST SUBMIT THE CANCELLATION OR REISSUE REQUEST AT LEAST 4 HOURS BEFORE THE TIME LIMIT DEFINED IN THE AIRLINE's POLICY.
